# n8n Dashboard - MaximoSEO

Visual dashboard for monitoring n8n automation workflows.

## Live Dashboard

**[View Dashboard](https://maximoseo.github.io/n8n-dashboard/)**

## Features

- Real-time workflow status overview
- Execution success/error tracking
- Visual timeline of recent executions
- Workflow tags and metadata
- Responsive dark-mode design
- Auto-generated from n8n API

## Tech Stack

- Pure HTML/CSS/JS (no build step)
- Hosted on GitHub Pages
- Data from n8n Cloud API
